text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket seems to be worried about
something...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... My skin feels so dry.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
How'd this happen? Hey, Trainer, what do you
think?
choice_data_list: Maybe you're not getting enough nutrition?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I'm eating plenty! If I don't eat enough, I
can't be at my full strength!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Lately, I've been really into sweet snacks too!
They're tasty and give lots of energy—nothing
beats 'em!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
With super sweets, training goes super smooth! I
think!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Even yesterday, I had sweet stuff with my breakfast, lunch, and dinner! A super slam!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So why is my skin so rough? Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket doesn't seem to realize, but the
imbalance in her food intake is likely the cause of
her poor skin...
